compiledTemplates.template-4: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("cp /usr/share/perl5/PVE/APLInfo.pm /usr/share/perl5/PVE/APLInfo.pm_back");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("sed -i 's|http://download.proxmox.com|");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("|g' /usr/share/perl5/PVE/APLInfo.pm");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
